data.name: PageTitle
data.comment: Page title for vault storage insights

data.name: PageDescription
data.value: Se et estimat af din boks størrelse. For den bedste sync ydeevne, anbefales det at holde din boks størrelse lille og slette elementer, du ikke længere har brug for.
data.comment: Page description for vault storage insights

data.name: BreadcrumbTitle
data.comment: Breadcrumb title for storage insights page

data.name: EstimatedTotalTitle
data.comment: Title for the estimated total vault size card

data.name: EstimatedTotalDescription
data.value: Dette er tilnærmelsesvis beregnet ud fra dine lokale data.
data.comment: Subtext explaining that the estimate is approximate

data.name: CountsTitle
data.comment: Title for the counts/overview section

data.name: ItemCountLabel
data.comment: Label for total item count card

data.name: ItemsWithAttachmentsLabel
data.comment: Label for count of items that have at least one attachment

data.name: ItemsWithLogosLabel
data.comment: Label for count of items that reference a logo

data.name: BreakdownTitle
data.comment: Title for the breakdown bar section

data.name: BreakdownDescription
data.value: Omtrentlige andel af boksens størrelse efter kategori. Vedhæftede filer og logoer optager normalt det meste af pladsen.
data.comment: Description for the breakdown bar

data.name: BreakdownCredentialsLabel
data.comment: Legend label for credential data slice

data.name: BreakdownAttachmentsLabel
data.comment: Legend label for attachments slice

data.name: BreakdownLogosLabel
data.comment: Legend label for logos slice

data.name: BreakdownBaseOverheadLabel
data.comment: Legend label for the fixed SQLite base/schema overhead slice

data.name: TopAttachmentsTitle
data.comment: Title for the top attachments table

data.name: TopAttachmentsDescription
data.value: Top 10 største vedhæftede filer. Fjern vedhæftningen, hvis du ikke længere har brug for det.
data.comment: Description for the top attachments table

data.name: TopLogosTitle
data.comment: Title for the top logos table

data.name: TopLogosDescription
data.value: Top 10 største service logoer. Logoer genbruges for elementer med samme domæne.
data.comment: Description for the top logos table

data.name: ColumnFilename
data.comment: Table column header for attachment filename

data.name: ColumnSize
data.comment: Table column header for size in KB

data.name: ColumnItem
data.comment: Table column header for the parent item name

data.name: ColumnCreated
data.comment: Table column header for creation date

data.name: ColumnWebsiteURL
data.comment: Table column header for logo source domain

data.name: ColumnItemCount
data.comment: Table column header for the number of items using a logo

data.name: LogoManagementTitle
data.comment: Title for the logo management section

data.name: LogoManagementDescription
data.value: Logoer hentes fra favicon af hvert element hjemmeside. Du kan slette hvert logo for at genvinde plads, eller re-downloade dem for at hente forbedrede versioner.
data.comment: Description for the logo management section

data.name: DeleteAllLogosButton
data.comment: Button to delete every logo in the vault

data.name: RedownloadAllLogosButton
data.comment: Button to re-fetch favicons for every item with a URL

data.name: DeleteAllLogosConfirmTitle
data.comment: Confirmation modal title for delete-all-logos

data.name: DeleteAllLogosConfirmMessage
data.value: Dette fjerner alle gemte logo fra din boks og rydder logoet på hver legitimationsoplysninger. Du kan gendownloade dem når som helst. Fortsæt?
data.comment: Confirmation modal body for delete-all-logos

data.name: RedownloadAllLogosConfirmTitle
data.comment: Confirmation modal title for redownload-all-logos

data.name: RedownloadAllLogosConfirmMessage
data.value: Dette genindlæser favicon for alle legitimationsoplysninger, der har en hjemmeside URL, erstatter det eksisterende logo. Afhængigt af din boks størrelse kan dette tage et stykke tid. Fortsæt?
data.comment: Confirmation modal body for redownload-all-logos
